variables.name: EXTI_Peripheral
variables.code:
EXTI_Peripheral   : A0B.Peripherals.EXTI.EXTI_Registers
  with Import, Address => A0B.STM32G4.Peripherals.EXTI_Base;

generic_instantiations.name: EXTI
generic_instantiations.code:
package EXTI is
  new GPIO.Generic_EXTI
    (Interrupt_Number               => A0B.ARMv7M.External_Interrupt_Number,
     Clear_Pending_Enable_Interrupt => Clear_Pending_Enable_Interrupt,
     Disable_Interrupt              => Disable_Interrupt,
     Enable_EXTI_Clock              => Enable_EXTI_Clock,
     Disable_EXTI_Clock             => Disable_EXTI_Clock,
     EXTI                           => EXTI_Peripheral,
     SYSCFG                         => SYSCFG_Peripheral,
     EXTI0                          => A0B.STM32G4.Interrupts.EXTI0,
     EXTI1                          => A0B.STM32G4.Interrupts.EXTI1,
     EXTI2                          => A0B.STM32G4.Interrupts.EXTI2,
     EXTI3                          => A0B.STM32G4.Interrupts.EXTI3,
     EXTI4                          => A0B.STM32G4.Interrupts.EXTI4,
     EXTI9_5                        => A0B.STM32G4.Interrupts.EXTI9_5,
     EXTI15_10                      => A0B.STM32G4.Interrupts.EXTI15_10);

generic_instantiations.name: GPIO
generic_instantiations.code:
package GPIO is
  new A0B.STM32.Generic_GPIO
    (Enable_GPIO_Clock  => Enable_GPIO_Clock,
     Disable_GPIO_Clock => Disable_GPIO_Clock);
